## Discussion

This value is used for Uniform with integer data types Defaults to INT32_MAX for uniform distributions and 0 for normal distributions.

# maxInteger

**Instance Property**

The upper range of the distribution.

## Declaration

```swift
var maxInteger: Int { get set }
```

## Discussion

This value is used for Uniform with integer data types Defaults to INT32_MAX for uniform distributions and 0 for normal distributions.
title: maxInteger
